task_completion.description: Agent reads the specification document to obtain geometry parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) or terminal window displaying the contents of /home/ga/Desktop/bwb_spec.txt.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a multi-section Wing component for the blended wing body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenVSP is open, and a 'Wing' component is visible in the Geometry Browser and the 3D workspace representing the main body.

task_completion.description: Agent sets the main wing parameters to match the specification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP Wing geometry dialog is open, showing parameters matching the spec: Span (b) = 6.1, Root Chord (Croot) = 3.6, and Sweep = 50.0.

task_completion.description: Agent creates twin vertical fins using Wing components on the outer wing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D view shows two vertically oriented fin structures attached to the outer sections of the main wing, and additional Wing component(s) are listed in the Geometry Browser.

task_completion.description: Agent strictly avoids using Fuselage or Pod components.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP Geometry Browser list contains ONLY Wing-type components. There are no 'Fuselage' or 'Pod' components listed.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the completed model to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog showing the path /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/bwb_concept.vsp3, or the OpenVSP window title bar displaying 'bwb_concept.vsp3'.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenVSP graphical interface to build the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenVSP GUI with geometry being manipulated and parameter windows open, rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the modeling process by writing the .vsp3 file directly in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editor open containing raw XML/VSP3 code for the final output file.

integrity.description: Agent actually opened the spec file to read it, rather than magically knowing the parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: A screenshot must exist showing the bwb_spec.txt file being read in a terminal or text editor before the parameters are entered in OpenVSP.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output model path is /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/bwb_concept.vsp3. The target parameters for the main wing component are: Span = 6.10, Root Chord = 3.60, and Sweep = 50.0 degrees.
